originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__p_1618' is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'p' is never read
model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_UNREGISTER_HWIF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_SCAN_HWIF () Bool
  false)
reasoning: p is assigned at L16 in case 'W' (HDPARM_HDIO_UNREGISTER_HWIF=T, SCAN=F) but the subsequent switch cases that would read p are not reached for input character 'W'. The dead store is real and new (no // ERROR). PC includes restrictive library macro !_STDLIB_H in addition to real flags UNREGISTER AND !SCAN, making it over-constrained.
